summary: Frontend-only testing of Kilolab Admin Dashboard dark theme refonte and related features. All 7 requested features tested successfully. Landing page shows 'Libérez votre temps' hero with video, Navigation has all links (Tarifs, FAQ, Contact, Devenir Washer), BecomeWasher has Live Counter connected to Supabase, FAQ/Contact/Tarifs all display French translations correctly, Admin Login ('Super Access') at /admin/login shows dark theme with slate-900 background and glass-morphism card.

minor.issue: 401 error on BecomeWasher page when fetching washer stats - component handles gracefully with minimum counts fallback

passed_tests: Landing Page - Hero displays 'Libérez votre temps. On prend soin de votre linge.'
Landing Page - Trust badge visible with 'Disponible partout en France'
Landing Page - Primary CTA button 'Confier mon linge' visible
Landing Page - HTML5 video section working with Coverr.co video
Navigation - Navbar visible with data-testid='navbar'
Navigation - Tarifs link visible (data-testid='nav-tarifs')
Navigation - FAQ link visible (data-testid='nav-faq')
Navigation - Contact link visible (data-testid='nav-contact')
Navigation - Devenir Washer button visible (data-testid='washer-link')
BecomeWasher - Hero title 'Votre machine tourne. Votre compte aussi.' visible
BecomeWasher - Live Counter displays 'X Washers se sont inscrits aujourd'hui'
BecomeWasher - Live Counter displays 'X candidatures en cours de validation'
BecomeWasher - Green animated ping indicator for live data visible
BecomeWasher - Supabase integration for washer stats working (with fallback)
FAQ Page - French title 'Questions fréquentes' displayed
FAQ Page - Accordion components present (16 items)
Contact Page - French title 'Contactez-nous' displayed
Contact Page - Form with email input visible
Contact Page - Form with message textarea visible
Tarifs Page - French title 'Tarifs simples. Sans surprise.' displayed
Tarifs Page - 3€/kg Standard pricing visible
Tarifs Page - 5€/kg Express pricing visible
Admin Login - Page accessible at /admin/login
Admin Login - 'Super Access 🚀' title displayed
Admin Login - Dark theme (bg-slate-900) background applied
Admin Login - Form container with slate-800 glass-morphism styling
Admin Login - Email and password inputs visible
Admin Login - 'Entrer' submit button visible
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.tsx implements dark theme correctly with bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-slate-900
Glass-morphism effects properly applied (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm, bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm)
Stats cards use proper dark theme gradients (teal-500/10, emerald-500/20, etc.)
SuperAccess.tsx login page correctly uses dark theme (bg-slate-900, bg-slate-800)
LiveWashersSection in BecomeWasher.tsx correctly fetches from Supabase with proper fallback for empty data
React Router v7 future flag warnings present in console (non-blocking)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard dark theme refonte complete with slate-900 background, glass-morphism cards (bg-white/5 backdrop-blur), teal/cyan gradients. Admin login at /admin/login (not /super-access). BecomeWasher Live Counter uses Supabase washers table with Math.max() fallback for minimum display counts (3 today, 12 pending). All French translations working correctly via react-i18next.

mocked_features.B2B_partners: B2B partners list is mock data in AdminDashboard (as noted by main agent)
